title: Brevo vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Brevo and Moosend email marketing tools. See pricing, features, ratings and find the best fit for your needs.
intro: Both Brevo and Moosend are popular freemium email marketing platforms, but they cater to different business needs. Brevo excels as an all-in-one CRM suite with multi-channel capabilities, while Moosend focuses on affordable automation for small businesses. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your marketing goals.

comparison_table.tool_b: Unlimited emails at low cost with automation

choose_a_if: You need multi-channel marketing (SMS, WhatsApp, live chat) integrated into one platform
You require a robust CRM and transactional email API capabilities
You want a larger free tier with up to 100,000 contacts for testing
choose_b_if: You're a small business looking for the most affordable paid plan starting at $9/month
You prioritize unlimited emails and automation workflows over advanced features
You need landing pages and subscription forms for lead generation

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your needs. Brevo wins for businesses requiring multi-channel marketing and CRM functionality, while Moosend excels for budget-conscious small businesses prioritizing email volume and automation. Moosend has a slightly higher G2 rating (4.7 vs 4.5), suggesting strong customer satisfaction overall.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Brevo or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper for paid plans, starting at $9/month versus Brevo's $25/month. However, Brevo's free tier accommodates 100,000 contacts compared to Moosend's 1,000, making Brevo better if you need to stay free longer. For most growing businesses, Moosend offers better long-term value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Brevo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms typically support contact list exports and data migration. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber lists as CSV files, which can then be imported into Brevo. However, automation workflows and campaign history won't transfer, so plan for some manual setup during migration.
